creator: chris@chrullrich.net
text:
The latest fix to the www/nginx port updates the external auth_krb5 module to a new Github tag. files/extra-patch-spnego-http-auth-nginx-module-config is not updated and still expects the old commit in the file name, leading to:

    ===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/www/nginx/files/extra-patch-spnego-http-auth-nginx-module-config
    No file to patch.  Skipping...

After updating the path in the patch file, the patch applies and the port builds again, but I cannot say whether additional changes to the patch are required.
